metadata.name: Request a Copy of a Previous Tax Return

description: A citizen needs a copy of their state income tax return from two years ago.

expected_outcome.value: Agent securely verifies the citizen's identity.

nodes.task_description: Locate the requested tax return in the archive.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully finds the tax return from the specified year.

nodes.task_description: Provide a digital copy of the tax return to the citizen through a secure portal.

expected_outcome.value: Agent makes the document available for the citizen to download securely.
